ecosystemflora:config-field-ApplyCrossHa: On: terrestrial and aquatic plants share spacing rules. Off: spacing only within same habitat.
ecosystemflora:config-field-ApplyWorldge: On: spread fitness uses worldgen rainfall map. Off: rainfall gate ignored (forest cover still uses neighbor trees).
ecosystemflora:config-field-BalancePrese: natural/lush/sparse apply bundled spread values on each server start. custom keeps your manual spread tuning.
ecosystemflora:config-field-BerryTraitMu: Higher: offspring more often lose one random trait on spread. 0 = no mutations.
ecosystemflora:config-field-BurstRegistr: Higher: more ms to finish one burst chunk on load. Lower: smaller burst completion slice.
ecosystemflora:config-field-CanopyActivi: Higher: faster seasonal defoliation and budding curves. Lower: subtler canopy seasons. 1.0 = default.
ecosystemflora:config-field-CanopyAmbien: Higher: more autumn leaf drift particles. Lower: sparser drift. 1.0 = default.
Higher: particles only under taller foliage above feet. Lower: ambience in shorter crowns.
Higher: denser green mote spawn under canopy. Lower: fewer motes. 1.0 = default.
Higher: less frequent canopy density re-sample (less CPU). Lower: more responsive ambience.
On: suppress canopy particles during heavy rain. Off: particles still spawn in rain.
ecosystemflora:config-field-CanopyBudMin: Higher: spring buds need warmer cells (shorter bud season). Lower: buds in cooler weather.
ecosystemflora:config-field-CanopyFallen: Higher (toward 1): more stick drops at peak autumn. Lower (toward 0): rarer sticks.
ecosystemflora:config-field-CanopyLatitu: Higher: stronger polar slowdown of canopy seasons. Lower: less latitude effect. 0 = off.
ecosystemflora:config-field-ChunkScanTic: Higher: less frequent registration and foliage chunk sync. Lower: faster registry/foliage sync.
ecosystemflora:config-field-CloneBerryTr: On: spread copies parent bush genetic traits. Off: vanilla random wild traits on new bushes.
ecosystemflora:config-field-DefaultOther: Higher: different species need more distance. Lower: mixed stands can be denser.
ecosystemflora:config-field-DefaultSameS: Higher: same species must stay farther apart (patchier). Lower: denser same-species stands.
ecosystemflora:config-field-Displacement: Higher: incumbent harder to displace (needs much stronger challenger). Lower: easier takeovers.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EcologyInspe: Higher: longer wait between inspect requests per player. Lower: more frequent inspects.
Higher: wider nearby-species tally in inspect report. Lower: more local species list.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EcologyWakeR: 0 = auto from spread radius and spacing. Higher: wake more neighbors on block changes.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EcosystemEna: On: spread, competition, stress, and most ecology ticks run. Off: mod ecology idle.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EmptySpreadF: Higher: empty cells much more attractive when prefer-empty is on. Lower: weaker empty bias.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableBackgr: On: classify columns on worker from main-thread snapshot. Off: sync scan on main thread only.
On: score spread candidates on worker from compact env snapshots; SetBlock stays on main thread. Requires two-phase spread. Terrestrial, mat, and water crowfoot.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableBerryC: On: wild berries spread one mat step from colony edge (rhizome, suckers, runners); seed jumps use RhizomeSeedDispersal settings. Off: legacy radius spread.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableBerryS: On: spread berry bushes reset to cutting state and register when mature. Off: immediate registry.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableBurstR: On: finish nearby chunk registration on load within ms budget. Off: no burst completion.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableCanopy: On: client green motes and autumn leaf drift under tall deciduous crowns. Off: no particles.
On: drop ванильные палки when branchy foliage strips in autumn. Off: no stick drops.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableChunkF: On: round-robin spread attempts across registry chunks (fair pacing). Off: less fair chunk order.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableCyclic: On: round-robin live scan registers flowers/tallgrass after chunk load. Off: one-shot scan only.
On: round-robin scan for new log-grown trunks after load. Off: no background tree discovery.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableEcolog: On: include area species mix in inspect report. Off: target block only.
On: cache spread column snapshots (faster repeat attempts). Off: rescan columns each time.
On: inspect (I) includes recent ecology events at the bottom of the report. Off: no history lines.
On: allow ecology inspect hotkey (default I). Off: inspect disabled.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableEmptyF: On: collect empty-cell candidates before displacement pass. Off: single combined pass.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableEventD: On: wake neighbor ecology when relevant blocks change. Off: spread only on scheduled ticks.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableFallow: On: empty farmland near wild plants slowly regains nutrients. Off: no fallow restoration.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableFernPh: On: fern dormant/sporulating/dieback phase blocks and spread gates. Off: text-only sporulation gate.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableFernRh: On: ground ferns spread one orthogonal step from patch edge (rhizome). Off: legacy radius spread.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableFernSp: On: ferns spread only during active sporulation season (FernSeason curve). Off: year-round when fitness allows.
On: parent fern waits after each spread attempt. Off: only calendar interval applies.
On: spread places small juvenile ferns that mature before reproducing. Off: instant adult.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableFerntr: On: ferntree-normal blocks register, spread, age, and senesce. Off: vanilla ferntree only.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableFlower: On: empty hand harvests flower block; knife/scythe yields drygrass. Off: vanilla harvest only.
On: meadow flowers follow simulated phases (dormant/vegetative/bloom/dieback). Spread only in bloom; block appearance follows phase.
On: parent flower waits after each spread attempt before retry. Off: only calendar spread interval applies.
On: meadow colonizer flowers spread as small seedlings, then mature. Off: instant adult plant.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableMyceli: On: register anchors; niche stress and death on mycelium. Off: vanilla mycelium only.
On: slow orthogonal network spread from mat edge between anchors. Off: no network colonization.
On: meadow spread penalty and forest bonus near mycelium anchors. Off: no mycelium niche tuning.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableOrphan: On: remove wild leaves with no path to log-grown (e.g. after wildfire). Off: leave floating foliage.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnablePlayer: On: drain player-vicinity chunks before background registration queue. Off: uniform queue order.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableReprod: On: log reproduce phase timings when registry is large. Off: no profiling logs.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableSeason: On: wake seasonal species once per in-game month. Off: no monthly coarse wake.
On: deciduous autumn strip and spring bud on log-grown skeleton. Off: static vanilla crowns.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableShoreS: On: brown sedge spreads one block at mat edge (slow clump rhizome). Off: legacy radius spread. No seed jumps by default.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableSpread: On: skip columns known occupied on empty-first pass (faster). Off: scan all columns.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableSpring: On: spring branchy buds scale with tree calendar age. Off: uniform spring bud strength.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableStress: On: remove plants after repeated failed survival checks. Off: plants never removed by stress.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableStumpD: On: senescent snag stumps decay and remove after calendar years. Off: stumps persist.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableSymbio: On: forest symbionts need tree hosts; orphans fade via stress death after host loss. Off: symbiosis rules off.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableTallgr: On: tallgrass and brown sedge winter dormant and stress dieback visuals; spread gated off-season. Off: vanilla blocks only.
On: spread places very low grass; mod raises to short on a timer before spread. Off: height chosen at spread.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableThirdP: On: blocks with ecologyParticipant JSON from other mods join ecology. Off: vanilla blocks only.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableTrampl: On: player proximity accumulates trampling stress on plants. Off: no trampling stress.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableTreeAg: On: calendar age and yearly structure growth on wild trees. Off: no wild tree growth (senescence needs this).
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableTreeSe: On: phased wild tree death after species lifespan (snag → stump/logs). Off: trees never die of age.
On: final year spawns vanilla stump and fallen logs. Off: snag removed without remains.
On: pioneer trees prefer open cells; climax trees prefer mature forest cover. Off: forest cover gates only.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableTwoPha: On: evaluate spread then commit SetBlock in fair pass. Off: immediate placement on success.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EnableWildVi: On: wildvine-end blocks spread down and along captured walls. Off: static vines.
ecosystemflora:config-field-EventWakeRet: Higher: event wake pulls spread retry farther forward (after spawn cooldown). Lower: subtler wake nudge.
ecosystemflora:config-field-FallowRestor: Higher: faster nutrient recovery on fallow fields. Lower: slower restoration. 1.0 = default.
ecosystemflora:config-field-FarmlandNutr: Higher: stronger till nutrient bonus from wild plants. Lower: weaker bridge. 1.0 = default.
ecosystemflora:config-field-FernSpreadCo: Higher: shorter post-spread pause on parent ferns. Lower: longer cooldown.
ecosystemflora:config-field-FerntreeSene: Higher: more trunk segments during ferntree snag phase. Lower: shorter snag.
ecosystemflora:config-field-FloraContext: Higher: longer cache for local forest cover (less CPU). Lower: fresher context updates.
Higher: harder to count as forest interior (needs more neighbors). Lower: easier interior label.
Higher: count trees farther away for forest context. Lower: more local edge/interior signal.
ecosystemflora:config-field-FloraOpenInt: Higher: open-field species penalized more in forest interior. Lower: milder edge effect.
ecosystemflora:config-field-FlowerBloomE: Higher: longer vegetative wait before bloom. Lower: faster bloom after season opens.
ecosystemflora:config-field-FlowerBloomM: Higher: tolerate hotter summers before dieback. Lower: earlier heat dieback.
Higher: flowers need warmer weather to bloom (shorter bloom window). Lower: bloom in cooler cells.
ecosystemflora:config-field-FlowerPhenol: Higher: faster vegetative energy buildup. Lower: slower path to bloom.
ecosystemflora:config-field-FlowerSpread: Higher: shorter post-spread pause on parent flowers. Lower: longer cooldown between offspring.
ecosystemflora:config-field-FoliageBudge: Higher: more ms for foliage random tick (smoother, more CPU). 0 = linked/unlimited alias.
ecosystemflora:config-field-FoliageCatch: On: sync foliage to current season when chunk loads. Off: foliage may lag until random tick.
ecosystemflora:config-field-FoliageChunk: Higher: more ms per chunk foliage sync pass. Lower: faster passes, less work per chunk.
Higher: more chunks resumed per chunk-scan tick. Lower: slower foliage catch-up.
ecosystemflora:config-field-FoliageColum: Higher: scan fewer blocks above surface (less work). 0 = full column height.
ecosystemflora:config-field-FoliagePeakA: Higher: strip more branchy foliage in peak autumn (0 = keep all branchy). Lower: gentler strip.
ecosystemflora:config-field-FoliageResto: On: winter repair adds branchy leaves on bare log-grown pillars. Off: bare crowns stay bare.
ecosystemflora:config-field-FoliageSyncM: chunk = sync on chunk load (default). hybrid = chunk plus random tick. random = legacy random only.
ecosystemflora:config-field-GrowthHoursM: Higher: spread flower seedlings and tallgrass stages mature faster. Lower: longer establishing phase.
ecosystemflora:config-field-HarshWildPla: On: species climate and soil bounds apply (wrong niche builds stress). Off: softer survival checks.
ecosystemflora:config-field-LimitSpreadN: On: spread, stress, and tree aging only near players; chunk registration unchanged. Off: full simulation.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxBurstRegi: Higher: allow more registrations when finishing one burst chunk. Lower: cap burst chunk size.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxChunkColu: Higher: more sync column scans when background scan off. Lower: slower registration catch-up.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxFailedSur: Higher: more failed checks tolerated before stress removal. Lower: plants die sooner from stress.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxFernPheno: Higher: more fern phenology updates per tick. Lower: slower phase sync.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxFloraResc: Higher: more columns scanned per tick for flora discovery. Lower: slower meadow fill-in, less CPU.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxFlowerPhe: Higher: more flower phase updates per tick. Lower: slower phenology pacing.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxFoliageCa: Higher: more strip+bud ops per chunk per pass (0 = unlimited). Lower: slower seasonal catch-up.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxFoliageCe: Higher: more random foliage cells per reproduce tick (hybrid/random). 0 = off.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxPendingBe: Higher: more berry maturation checks per tick. Lower: slower spread bush queue.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxPendingFe: Higher: more fern maturation checks per tick. Lower: slower juvenile queue.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxPendingFl: Higher: more maturation checks per game tick. Lower: slower maturation queue.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxPendingTa: Higher: more grass establishment checks per game tick. Lower: slower promotion queue.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxPendingTr: Higher: more mod-placed saplings polled per tick until log-grown appears. Lower: slower sapling watch.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxPriorityC: Higher: more priority queue passes per chunk-scan tick. Lower: slower player-vicinity registration.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxPriorityR: Higher: more registrations from priority queue per tick. Lower: slower near-player fill.
Higher: more extra applies for player-vicinity chunks. Lower: slower near-player registry.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxRegistrat: Higher: copy more block ids to snapshot per main tick. Lower: slower background scan feed.
Higher: more sync registrations when background scan off. Lower: slower registry fill.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxRegistryA: Registry applies per chunk per tick
Higher: more registry inserts from one chunk per drain pass. Lower: fairer but slower single-chunk meadows.
Higher: more paced RegisterReproducer applies per chunk-scan tick. Lower: slower registry pacing.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxReproduce: Higher: more spread evaluations per reproduce tick (faster sim, more CPU). Lower: gentler spread pacing.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxSpreadAtt: Higher: more spread attempts per chunk per reproduce tick. Lower: slower per-chunk spread.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxSpreadChu: Higher: visit more registry chunks per reproduce tick. Lower: slower global spread sweep.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxSpreadCom: Higher: more chunks in commit pass (0 = MaxSpreadChunksVisitedPerTick). Lower: narrower commit sweep.
Higher: more commits per chunk per tick (0 = MaxSpreadAttemptsPerChunkPerTick). Lower: slower local commits.
Higher: more spread block commits per tick (0 = MaxReproduceAttemptsPerTick). Lower: slower commits.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxStressChe: Higher: more stress evaluations per stress tick (faster catch-up, more CPU). Lower: gentler pacing.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxStumpDeca: Higher: more stump decay checks per tick. Lower: slower stump queue.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxTallgrass: Higher: more tallgrass phenology updates per tick. Lower: slower phase sync.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxTreeGrowt: Higher: more trees advanced per reproduce tick. Lower: slower aging, less CPU.
Tree growth catch-up years per tick
Higher: trees catch up more missed years after time skips. Lower: slower catch-up, less CPU. 1 = no catch-up.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MaxTreeResca: Higher: more columns scanned per tick for tree discovery. Lower: slower discovery, less CPU.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MinFitness-d: Higher: pickier offspring placement (fewer marginal sites). Lower: colonizes weaker cells more often.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MinSpeciesRe: Higher: minimum days between attempts per species (calendar mode). 0 = no floor.
Higher: minimum hours between attempts (legacy mode only). 0 = no floor.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MyceliumFore: Higher: forest anchor stressed unless more local cover (stricter). Lower: tolerates more open forest.
Higher: stronger forest understory bonus at anchor. Lower: weaker bonus.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MyceliumMead: Higher: meadow anchor tolerates more nearby trees before stress. Lower: stricter meadow niche.
Higher: meadow plants spread much slower at anchor (tapers to 1.0 at edge). Lower: milder penalty.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MyceliumSkip: On: no soil succession on mycelium anchor cells. Off: anchors participate in succession.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MyceliumSpre: Higher: more network spread attempts per in-game year. Lower: sparser mycelium network.
Higher: pickier network colonization and displacement. Lower: accepts weaker anchor sites.
Higher: faster mycelium network spread interval scale. Lower: slower colonization.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MyceliumTree: Higher: search farther for tree host required by forest mycelium. Lower: stricter host proximity.
ecosystemflora:config-field-MyceliumZone: Higher: wider Chebyshev niche around each anchor (vanilla growRange 7). Lower: tighter zone.
ecosystemflora:config-field-NicheCacheHo: Higher: longer per-cell niche cache. Lower: more frequent niche refresh.
ecosystemflora:config-field-NicheStressT: Higher: stricter niche gate for survival (more stress failures). Lower: more tolerant of bad niche.
ecosystemflora:config-field-OnlyActivate: On: spread, stress, trees, and chunk scans only within player radius (~192 blocks). Off: all loaded chunks.
ecosystemflora:config-field-OrphanFoliag: Hours after fire to prioritize orphan-prune chunk passes. 0 = no fire priority window.
Higher: longer support search before pruning (safer, more CPU). Lower: faster, may miss edge cases.
Orphan foliage checks per chunk pass
Higher: more orphan BFS checks per chunk pass (0 = unlimited). Lower: slower cleanup.
ecosystemflora:config-field-PlantSpacing: On: enforce Chebyshev spacing between spread plants. Off: spacing rules ignored.
ecosystemflora:config-field-PlayerActiva: Higher: wider radius for OnlyActivateNearPlayers and LimitSpreadNearPlayers. Lower: tighter playtest zone.
ecosystemflora:config-field-PlayerRegist: Higher: wider player-vicinity priority and burst registration. Lower: tighter priority zone.
ecosystemflora:config-field-PreferSpread: On: weight empty cells higher when spreading. Off: empty and occupied more even.
ecosystemflora:config-field-PriorityRegi: Higher: more ms per priority registration pass (smoother, more CPU). Lower: stricter time cap.
ecosystemflora:config-field-Registration: Higher: more ms for chunk-scan phase (0 = TickBudgetMs). Lower: tighter registration cap.
Higher: more background column-classification threads (max 8). 0 = half CPU cores. Snapshot and SetBlock stay on main thread.
ecosystemflora:config-field-ReproduceAtt: Higher: more spread tries per in-game year at species rate 1 (denser flora). Lower: sparser spread.
ecosystemflora:config-field-ReproduceCha: Higher (toward 1): more spread attempts succeed. Lower (toward 0): rarer successful placement.
ecosystemflora:config-field-ReproduceDeb: On: log spread attempts (pair with VerboseLogging). Off: silent spread path.
ecosystemflora:config-field-ReproduceInt: Higher: longer wait between spread attempts (legacy mode). Lower: more frequent attempts.
ecosystemflora:config-field-ReproduceRad: Higher: wider horizontal search for spread targets. Lower: tighter, more local colonization.
ecosystemflora:config-field-ReproduceTic: Higher: less frequent spread/foliage/tree ticks. Lower: more frequent spread updates.
Higher: less frequent profiling log lines. Lower: more frequent timing logs.
Higher: profiling logs only when registry is larger. Lower: logs on smaller registries.
ecosystemflora:config-field-ReproduceVer: Higher: search farther above/below for valid surface. Lower: narrower vertical placement window.
ecosystemflora:config-field-RespectLandC: On: block spread, displacement, stress, and tree changes inside protected claims. Off: claims ignored.
ecosystemflora:config-field-RhizomeSeedD: Higher: more frequent distant seed jumps. Lower: rarer jumps. 1.0 is default.
On: rare seed/fragment jumps for reed and lily mats. Off: mat-edge spread only.
Higher: stricter fitness for distant seed landing. Lower: jumps accept weaker sites.
ecosystemflora:config-field-SeasonalStre: On: seasonal stress die-off rolls for terrestrial plants. Off: no extra seasonal die-off.
ecosystemflora:config-field-SoilSuccessi: On: skip soil swaps when slabs/builds occupy column above ground. Off: succession always runs.
Higher: stronger soil tier shifts on spread/death. Lower: subtler succession. 1.0 = default.
ecosystemflora:config-field-SpacingVerti: Higher: check spacing conflicts farther above/below. Lower: tighter vertical spacing scan.
ecosystemflora:config-field-SpeciesSprea: Higher: faster wild spread vs ecology tables (1 = table rates). Lower: slower reproduction for all species.
ecosystemflora:config-field-SpreadBudget: Higher: more ms for spread phase (0 = TickBudgetMs). Lower: tighter spread cap.
ecosystemflora:config-field-SpreadWorker: Higher: more background spread-scoring threads (max 8). 0 = half CPU cores. Snapshot and SetBlock stay on main thread.
ecosystemflora:config-field-SpringBranch: Higher: stronger max spring branchy multiplier from age. Lower: subtler age effect.
Higher: older trees needed for max spring branchy boost. Lower: young trees reach max sooner.
ecosystemflora:config-field-StaggerRepro: On: random initial delay on registration spreads tick load. Off: all plants tick together.
ecosystemflora:config-field-StressBudget: Higher: more ms for stress phase (0 = TickBudgetMs). Lower: tighter stress cap.
ecosystemflora:config-field-StressRechec: Higher: slower stress evaluations per plant (less CPU). Lower: faster stress reactions.
ecosystemflora:config-field-StressTickIn: Higher: less frequent stress ticks (less CPU). Lower: more frequent stress updates.
ecosystemflora:config-field-StumpDecayYe: Higher: stumps linger longer. Lower: faster stump removal.
ecosystemflora:config-field-SymbiosisCas: Higher: wider host-cache invalidation and ecology wake when a symbiosis host is removed. Lower: tighter radius.
ecosystemflora:config-field-TickBudgetMs: Higher: more ms allowed per reproduce tick (smoother, more CPU). 0 = unlimited.
ecosystemflora:config-field-TramplingRad: Higher: players affect plants farther away. Lower: must stand closer to trample.
ecosystemflora:config-field-TramplingSoi: On: degrade soil when plant dies from trampling. Off: trampling kills plants only.
ecosystemflora:config-field-TramplingStr: Higher: more exposure ticks before trampling counts as failed survival. Lower: faster trample kill.
ecosystemflora:config-field-TreeGrowthAc: Higher: faster wild tree growth vs reference size. Lower: slower growth. 1.0 = default.
ecosystemflora:config-field-TreeMinSprea: Higher: trees must be older before they can spread. Lower: younger trees may spread sooner. 0 = no age gate.
ecosystemflora:config-field-TreeSenescen: Higher: more horizontal debarked logs near stump (0 = stump only). Lower: fewer logs.
Higher: more log-grown blocks left as snag during death phase. Lower: shorter snag stage.
ecosystemflora:config-field-TreeYoungSpr: Young tree spread bypass trunk height
Higher: more trees bypass the age gate (worldgen-sized trees spread even at age 0). Lower: stricter age gate. 0 = never bypass.
ecosystemflora:config-field-UseCalendarS: On: intervals scale from DaysPerYear/HoursPerDay. Off: use ReproduceIntervalHours only.
ecosystemflora:config-field-UseCellDispl: On: stronger species can displace weaker occupants. Off: no displacement on occupied cells.
ecosystemflora:config-field-UseFarmlandN: On: tilling adds N/P/K from dominant wild plant role. Off: vanilla till nutrients only.
ecosystemflora:config-field-UseFloraCont: On: neighbor trees/logs/leaves affect spread fitness. Off: ignore forest edge/interior context.
ecosystemflora:config-field-UseNicheCont: On: local moisture/light niche multipliers on spread fitness. Off: ignore niche layer.
ecosystemflora:config-field-UseRhizomeSp: On: cattail/tule/papyrus use mat-edge rhizome spread. Off: legacy radius spread.
ecosystemflora:config-field-UseSeasonalE: On: monthly spread multipliers from WildSpeciesSeason profiles. Off: uniform spread year-round.
ecosystemflora:config-field-UseSoilSucce: On: spread and death can change soil tier blocks. Off: soil blocks unchanged by ecology.
ecosystemflora:config-field-UseSpeciesSp: On: per-species SpreadRate scales interval and chance. Off: uniform spread pacing.
ecosystemflora:config-field-UseSurfaceMa: On: water lily uses floating pad mat spread. Off: legacy radius spread.
ecosystemflora:config-field-VerboseLoggi: On: extra notification and warning logs (CPU cost). Off: errors and startup only.
ecosystemflora:config-field-WildVineMaxH: How many blocks a vine may extend downward through open air below the last wall-backed segment (0 = wall only). Higher = longer free-hanging tips.
ecosystemflora:config-field-WildVineWall: Higher: taller vertical span for wall capture. Lower: shorter vine wall reach.
Higher: capture wall faces farther horizontally. Lower: vines only on nearby walls.
